title: Performance-Linked Incentive System
summary: Designed and implemented an incentive system aligned with operational efficiency and measurable performance.
problemStatement: Performance incentives were not directly linked to measurable operational outcomes.
solution: Developed a framework linking performance to efficiency metrics, built tracking and evaluation mechanisms, and integrated incentives into operational workflows.
impact: Improved accountability and performance alignment, encouraged efficiency-driven execution, and linked operational output to rewards.
leadershipValue: Demonstrates alignment of performance systems with business objectives.

interactionFiles.label: Interactive case brief
interactionFiles.description: Explore the incentive framework, efficiency metrics, and performance linkage design.
